_comment: Copy this file to rate-card.local.json and fill in real rates. The .local.json is gitignored and never committed. This template shows the schema only.
_gitignore_note: rate-card.local.json is gitignored. Keep real rates out of git.
_write_discipline: Rows are written by the human only. deal-debrief PROPOSES a rate_history row from each closed deal (effective hourly computed offline by tools/finance.py from cost actuals when available) and the human saves or discards it, mirroring the playbook-bootstrap discipline. rate-card-fill reads this file FIRST as the personal_rate source, before benchmark ranges (shared/finance-engine.md pricing standardization).
_boundary: Personal rates are decision inputs for proposal-price and pitch triage, never auto-quoted; the consequential-action gate (amount, counterparty, explicit yes) applies before any number reaches a brand.

uplifts.notes: set as a percent of base or a flat amount; null until the creator decides

rate_history.notes: what a real closed deal actually paid for this format; rows proposed by deal-debrief, saved by the human

notes: subscriber_tier (e.g. '50k_to_100k') keys benchmark comparisons; leaving it null makes pricing emit a benchmark_tier_assumed gap.
